_meta.name: failurelog-ghost-detection-pre
_meta.description: Pre-fix DB state replicating Bertie Tallstaff's 2026-06-08 10:06:02 ghost row on hf_sandbox AFTER #1345 Part A (dedup) landed but BEFORE Slice 1 (FailureLog wiring). The outbound-dial placeholder is stamped with an externalId (so #1345 dedup wouldn't fire on a duplicate webhook), but VAPI never returns 'ended' for it — the poll-stale reconciler eventually hits the 404 path. Pre-#1340 the row sat at endedAt:NULL forever AND was completely invisible in the Tune tab; markPollFailed flipped endedAt to NOW but no FailureLog was written and no parent Session row existed.

calls._note: Placeholder from /api/voice/calls/outbound-dial. externalId stamped successfully (#1345 Part B held). VAPI never reports the call as 'ended' — poll-stale-calls will hit 404 on next cycle (>=90s after createdAt). Pre-#1340, markPollFailed flipped endedAt to NOW but no FailureLog was written and no parent Session row existed; the row was invisible to the Tune tab.

_expected_state_pre_fix.narrative: One Call row that the operator can't see in the Tune tab AND ADAPT can't read to soft-acknowledge in the next prompt. The structural gap Slice 1 closes.
